nasb.text: He was in the world, and the world was made through Him, and the world did not know Him.

esv.text: He was in the world, and the world was made through him, yet the world did not know him.

cnv.text: 他在世界，世界也是藉著他造的，世界卻不認識他。

ccb.text: 祂来到自己所创造的世界，世界却不认识祂。

csbs.text: 他在这世界， 世界也是藉着他而成的， 世界却不认识他。
